title: Investing Club: Cramer says buy semiconductor stock Marvell ahead of earnings — here's why
text: "I typically don't like to do that because that's not the game we play," CNBC's Jim Cramer said, referring to the "game" of trying to market-time a stock.

title: Why the Earnings Surprise Streak Could Continue for Marvell (MRVL)
text: Marvell (MRVL) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Marvell Advances No-Compromise 5G Open RAN with Partners at MWC 2022
text: BARCELONA , Feb. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) today announced new 5G Open RAN DU and RU solutions with customers and partners powered by the company's flagship OCTEON Fusion baseband processor, featuring a comprehensive suite of 5G Layer 1 (L1) inline hardware accelerators and O-RAN standards support. These new open, virtualized DU and massive MIMO RU solutions, which build on Marvell's reference designs, augment traditional 5G RAN solutions that are globally deployed using the same OCTEON Fusion processors and bring high performance and power efficiency to cloud-native 5G.
